# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- For admin UI updates, keep terminology exactly as: CHRONICLE FROM/TO, TRANSACTION SEARCH LOGIC, EXECUTE FILTER, RESET STUDIO, MAGNITUDE, EVENT DATE; maintain color consistency with primary green #00B074 and navy sidebar #1E3A5F across pages.
- Use eGadgetHub branding in its original sidebar colors. Ensure the topbar Control Center chip has a green background for visibility.
- Prefer decluttered admin layouts by merging related sections into fewer cards/containers, especially on order detail pages.
- In admin reports/payment visualizations, only show enabled payment methods: eSewa and Cash On Delivery.
